## Entities.Fillings.IFillingIngredientEntity.ingredient property

Available ingredient options with preferred selection. The preferredId (or first id if not specified) is the primary ingredient.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly ingredient: Model.IIdsWithPreferred<IngredientId>;
```
